name: node-sdr
description: WebSDR application for RTL-SDR dongles — multi-user waterfall, spectrum, and audio

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=shared && npm run build --workspace=client && npm run build --workspace=server
scripts.clean: rm -rf shared/dist server/dist client/dist node_modules/.cache shared/tsconfig.tsbuildinfo server/tsconfig.tsbuildinfo
